title: Medical Social Worker Associate
description:
Responsibilities:

· Report directly to the Centre Manager.

· Be involved in the pre-admission work, such as taking on a new referral, liaising with the external agencies and internal team to facilitate an admission to centre based services.

· Assess & evaluate patients’/families’ psycho-social and financial status.

· Assist clients to apply for appropriate financial assistance schemes when needed (Medifund, Household Means Testing (Subvention) and other funding schemes).

· Assist in setting up and upkeep of administrative protocols pertaining to patient needs from onboarding to discharging.

· Work closely with team members in the development of the Individual Care Plan.

· Provide accurate information to clients on policies, procedures and service.

· Strong case resolution skills to resolve client feedback and complaints on promised actions and that client needs are addressed in a timely and appropriate manner.

· Work closely with other managers and medical social workers to ensure that all MOH service requirements on financial and quality aspects are strictly adhered to through rigorous and constant internal checks.

· Assist with logistics, staffing and operational capability of the centre when required.

· Communicate clearly and appropriately with clients & business partners, always speaking with the understanding of tone and choice of words.


Requirements:

- Diploma in Social Work or other relevant fields desirable.

- 5-days work week. Rotational weekends (Sat & Sun) required.

- Preferably minimum 2 years in a similar role in a daycare centre, would be good to have.

- Preferable experience working with MOH or other relevant stakeholders in the healthcare industry in general.

- Having experience with IRMS, ILTC Portal and other relevant IT systems would be good.

- Hands-on experience working with elderly in the community.

- Able to work independently with little supervision.

- Proficient in Microsoft Office and comfortable using IT tool in daily work.

- Able to communicate effectively with elderly.


Benefits:

- Attractive base salary.
- Opportunities for professional training and career development within organization.
- Health Insurance Coverage.
- Industry-specific training and mentorship from a highly experienced team.
- Supportive and flexible work environment that encourages innovation and process improvement.
- 15 days annual leave.
- Performance based bonus.


Location:

- Telok Blangah.

postedCompany.description: Active Global Home & Community Care is a provider of holistic, professional and affordable eldercare services.  Started in 2012 by providing live-in caregivers for elderly with complex medical conditions such as dementia, stroke etc., it has extended to subsidised home care services such as home personal care, home medical, home therapy, home nursing etc.  Appointed by the Ministry of Health in 2018, it also operates two active ageing hubs.  It has served high quality care to more than 3,000 clients regionally.
postedCompany.name: ACTIVE GLOBAL RESPITE CARE PTE. LTD.
